steps.t: Rodwen the wedding-planner is in the throne room of Minas Tirith as Midsummer's Day approaches. The name is familiar, but the Rodwen you met was an ad…
Rodwen is up some stairs north of the Tower of Ecthelion, beyond a doorway spanned by a flower garland, in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Rodwen has asked …
